languages.text: "А вы, наглая пташка? Представляетесь мертвецом, обвиняете почтенную герцогиню в преступлении. Я все еще не понимаю, на чьей стороне вы играете".

traits.locale_text: "А вы, наглая пташка? Представляетесь мертвецом, обвиняете почтенную герцогиню в преступлении. Я все еще не понимаю, на чьей стороне вы играете".

languages.text: "And what of you, you impudent {mf|whelp|chit}? Wearing the name of a dead man, accusing an honourable duchess of a crime. I still do not understand which side you are playing on."
languages.original_text: "А вы, наглая пташка? Представляетесь мертвецом, обвиняете почтенную герцогиню в преступлении. Я все еще не понимаю, на чьей стороне вы играете".

traits.locale_text: "And what of you, you impudent {mf|whelp|chit}? Wearing the name of a dead man, accusing an honourable duchess of a crime. I still do not understand which side you are playing on."
"And what of you, you impudent {mf|whelp|chit}? Wearing the name of a dead man, accusing an honourable duchess of a crime. I still do not understand which side you are playing on."
"And what of you, you impudent {mf|whelp|chit}? Wearing the name of a dead man, accusing an honourable duchess of a crime. I still do not understand which side you are playing on."

languages.text: “那你呢，你这无礼的{mf|小子|丫头}？顶着死人的名字，指控一位可敬的女爵有罪。我到现在都没搞明白，你究竟在为哪一方效力。”
languages.original_text: "And what of you, you impudent {mf|whelp|chit}? Wearing the name of a dead man, accusing an honourable duchess of a crime. I still do not understand which side you are playing on."

traits.locale_text: “那你呢，你这无礼的{mf|小子|丫头}？顶着死人的名字，指控一位可敬的女爵有罪。我到现在都没搞明白，你究竟在为哪一方效力。”

languages.text: « Vous êtes mal {mf|placé|placée} pour me faire des reproches, {mf|petit insolent|petite insolente}, vous qui portez le nom d'un mort et accusez une honorable duchesse d'un crime. Je n'arrive toujours pas à savoir dans quel camp vous êtes. »
languages.original_text: "And what of you, you impudent {mf|whelp|chit}? Wearing the name of a dead man, accusing an honourable duchess of a crime. I still do not understand which side you are playing on."

traits.locale_text: « Vous êtes mal {mf|placé|placée} pour me faire des reproches, {mf|petit insolent|petite insolente}, vous qui portez le nom d'un mort et accusez une honorable duchesse d'un crime. Je n'arrive toujours pas à savoir dans quel camp vous êtes. »

languages.text: "Peki ya sen küstah {mf|çocuk|kız}? Ölü bir adamın adını taşıyıp onurlu bir düşesi suçla itham ediyorsun. Ne amaçladığını anlamış değilim."
languages.original_text: "And what of you, you impudent {mf|whelp|chit}? Wearing the name of a dead man, accusing an honourable duchess of a crime. I still do not understand which side you are playing on."

traits.locale_text: "Peki ya sen küstah {mf|çocuk|kız}? Ölü bir adamın adını taşıyıp onurlu bir düşesi suçla itham ediyorsun. Ne amaçladığını anlamış değilim."

languages.text: «¿Y qué hay de usted, {mf|mozalbete|muchacha}? Viene con el nombre de un muerto para acusar a una honrada duquesa de un crimen. Sigo sin entender en qué bando está».
languages.original_text: "And what of you, you impudent {mf|whelp|chit}? Wearing the name of a dead man, accusing an honourable duchess of a crime. I still do not understand which side you are playing on."

traits.locale_text: «¿Y qué hay de usted, {mf|mozalbete|muchacha}? Viene con el nombre de un muerto para acusar a una honrada duquesa de un crimen. Sigo sin entender en qué bando está».

languages.text: "Und was ist mit Euch, Ihr {mf|vorlauter Welpe|vorlautes Kätzchen}? Ihr tragt den Namen eines Toten, bezichtigt eine ehrenwerte Herzogin eines Verbrechens. Ich verstehe immer noch nicht, auf welcher Seite Ihr steht."
languages.original_text: "And what of you, you impudent {mf|whelp|chit}? Wearing the name of a dead man, accusing an honourable duchess of a crime. I still do not understand which side you are playing on."

traits.locale_text: "Und was ist mit Euch, Ihr {mf|vorlauter Welpe|vorlautes Kätzchen}? Ihr tragt den Namen eines Toten, bezichtigt eine ehrenwerte Herzogin eines Verbrechens. Ich verstehe immer noch nicht, auf welcher Seite Ihr steht."

languages.text: 「そしてあなたはどうですか、生意気な{mf|子|ガキ}。死んだ男の名を借りて、名家の公爵夫人に罪を告げる。どちらの側に立っているのか、まだわからないわ。」
languages.original_text: "And what of you, you impudent {mf|whelp|chit}? Wearing the name of a dead man, accusing an honourable duchess of a crime. I still do not understand which side you are playing on."

traits.locale_text: 「そしてあなたはどうですか、生意気な{mf|子|ガキ}。死んだ男の名を借りて、名家の公爵夫人に罪を告げる。どちらの側に立っているのか、まだわからないわ。」
